summary: Iteration 3: Engagement telemetry feature on /report/:sessionId. Added 4 new backend tests covering GET /api/assessments/:id/share (404 when no link, response shape, no side effects, reflects /shared/:token traffic). Full backend suite of 25 tests passes (100%). Frontend e2e verified across the three states: no share link → no telemetry; share link with view_count=0 → no telemetry; share link with view_count>=1 → telemetry visible with correct singular/plural grammar, eyebrow styling, right-aligned, single small dot, inside no-print ancestor, on-demand refresh after share dialog interaction.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend GET /api/assessments/{id}/share correctly returns only the minimal 7-field telemetry payload (no executive_abstract leakage) and has zero side effects.
Frontend gating logic `shareTelemetry && shareTelemetry.view_count > 0` correctly hides the line in both non-existent-link (catch → null) and link-exists-but-zero-views states.
Telemetry line is wrapped in a `no-print` parent div, ensuring it is excluded from window.print() output as required.
Singular/plural handling (`time` vs `times`) verified against view_count=1 (singular) and view_count=2 (plural).
Visual restraint confirmed: eyebrow uppercase, mono-num counts, slate2 muted color, single 1x1 dot separator, no card/badge/avatar/icon.
seed_data_creation: Created a fresh assessment via POST /assessments/seed-demo (id=b3143d8c-8441-4952-b60a-5cc91841105a) to validate no-telemetry and view_count=1 paths. Also added 2 views to the demo current assessment (07d94cfc...) to support telemetry-visible test.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend suite at /app/backend/tests/test_die_backend.py now has 25 tests including TestShareTelemetry (4 tests). Run with: cd /app/backend && python -m pytest tests/test_die_backend.py -v. Demo current assessment 07d94cfc-fa89-4c76-a8cb-f5f8823300bf already has a share link with view_count>=2 from this iteration's testing.
rca of the issue: N/A — feature works as specified, no defects found.
